principles.local_desc: All data lives on your device — no server, no account
principles.direction_desc: The app never asks you to do more, only to aim more honestly
principles.clarity_desc: Reports are calm, specific, data-driven — no false encouragement
principles.axis_desc: Your Prime is not fixed — the system tracks its drift over time

setup.title: Choose AI Provider
setup.subtitle: All API keys are stored locally on your device.
setup.cors_warning: In the Electron desktop app, Anthropic API works directly with no CORS issues. Browser dev mode requires Vite proxy configuration.

me.title: Profile
me.subtitle: View your Prime Profile, browse history, and update your direction.
me.profile_empty: No Prime Profile yet. Complete the questionnaire first.
me.update_desc: Describe recent changes, new goals, or realizations. AI will suggest an update based on your current Profile.
me.update_placeholder: e.g. I've realized that chasing scale is no longer my core motivation…
me.error_no_profile: Please complete the questionnaire and lock your Prime Profile first
me.guide_desc: The philosophy and usage of LocuSelf
me.reset_history_desc: Clears all ΔP records and cumulative P. Profile and journal content are preserved.
me.reset_journals_desc: Deletes all journal entries and plans. P-value history is preserved.
me.reset_all_desc: Deletes all user data. The app returns to its initial state.
me.confirm_history_body: All ΔP records and cumulative P will be cleared. Profile and journal content are preserved. This cannot be undone.
me.confirm_journals_body: All journal entries and plan records will be deleted. P-value history is preserved. This cannot be undone.
me.confirm_all_body: All user data will be deleted, including Profile, questionnaire, journals, plans, and P-value history. This cannot be undone.

plan.title: Daily Plan
plan.subtitle: List today's actions. AI will assign a Prime level to each.
plan.error_no_profile: Prime Profile not found. Please complete the questionnaire first.

journal.title: Daily Journal
journal.subtitle: Log what happened today. Choose a self-rating to calculate ΔP.
journal.error_compat: Provider changed (current: {{cur}}, Profile generated by: {{prev}}). Please re-lock your Profile on the Profile page.

report.title: Daily Report
report.subtitle: Objective analysis based on today's journal data.
report.error_no_journal: No journal entries. Please write your daily journal first.

questionnaire.title: Prime Questionnaire
questionnaire.subtitle: Answer these questions to help the AI understand who you are.
questions: What do you consider your core mission or direction right now? Be honest, not grand.
In the past year, what activities made you feel truly engaged, energized, and unperformed?
What kind of person do you least want to become? What behavioral patterns do you want to avoid?
If income and external judgment didn't matter, what would a typical day look like for you?
What is currently stopping you from living the life you described above?

profile_confirm.title: Confirm Your Prime Profile
profile_confirm.subtitle: This was generated from your questionnaire. Edit it here before locking. Locking generates your Embedding vector.
